name: Bean & Bacon Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the washed beans with 6-8 cups of water and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat, cover, and boil gently for 1 hour.
3. Simmer while still covered; stir about every 15 minutes for the entire time the beans are cooking.
4. After the beans have been cooking for about 1 hour and 45 minutes, chop the onion and celery and carrots.
5. Slice the bacon into 1-inch squares. Sauté the onion, celery, and bacon squares in olive oil for about 10 minutes.
6. Add to the beans along with thyme, chopped carrots, and tomato paste. Simmer uncovered for another hour until the beans are tender.
7. Add salt, pepper, and wine vinegar before serving.
